## Issue checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and pull requests.
- [ ] I included the affected URL, path, or command.
- [ ] I described current behavior, expected behavior, and impact.
- [ ] I included minimal reproduction steps or explained why reproduction is intermittent.
- [ ] I identified the affected language(s).
- [ ] I included a verifiable source for public or scientific content issues.
- [ ] I removed credentials, session data, private material, and secrets from this report.
- [ ] This report does not request an unauthorized Boda write or production probe.
